intro: Colobachne vaginata, also known as Kangaroo Grass, is a perennial grass species native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential applications in wound healing and antimicrobial therapy.
